title: elaphoglossum oreophilum
intro: Elaphoglossum oreophilum, also known as the alpine elaphoglossum, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum oreophilum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. Elaphoglossum oreophilum can be prepared as a tea or infused in water to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
